# RMMZ Mod Loader (RPG Maker MZ Mod Loader)

> A mod loader and in-game mod manager for RPG Maker MZ (RMMZ) games, with UI for enabling/disabling mods, editing plugin parameters, and reordering load order.

RMMZ Mod Loader runs inside the game and provides an in-game menu to manage mods.  
It only registers .js plugins into the plugin list; to inject data into the game, a separate data injection mod is required.

Key features:
- In-game mod management (no need to edit plugins.js manually)
- Enable/disable mods and edit their parameters
- Reorder mod load order by drag-and-drop
- Drag-and-drop installation of .js mods or a `mods/` folder
- @text aliases for Chinese parameter names
- @schema templates for struct/table parameters

## Documentation

- [README (Chinese)](https://github.com/jokerBBC/RPG-maker-mz-mod-loader#readme): Overview, installation, usage
- [Changelog](https://github.com/jokerBBC/RPG-maker-mz-mod-loader/blob/main/docs/modloader_CHANGELOG.md): Release history

## Example Mods

- [TestMod.js](https://github.com/jokerBBC/RPG-maker-mz-mod-loader/blob/main/js/mods/TestMod.js): Basic parameter type tests
- [TestSchemaMod.js](https://github.com/jokerBBC/RPG-maker-mz-mod-loader/blob/main/js/mods/TestSchemaMod.js): struct/table and @schema examples
- [mydrop.js](https://github.com/jokerBBC/RPG-maker-mz-mod-loader/blob/main/js/mods/mydrop.js): Practical mod – monster drop extensions
